title: ajuga × borbasiana
intro: Ajuga × borbasiana is a hybrid plant, resulting from the cross between Ajuga reptans and Ajuga genevensis, both members of the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, improving digestion, and acting as a natural antihistamine. In herbal preparations, Ajuga × borbasiana is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential interactions with other medications.
